name: Corsa Coal Corp.
summary: Corsa Coal Corp. operates as a coal mining company. It is involved in the mining, processing, and selling metallurgical coal; and exploring, acquiring, and developing resource properties. The company produces and sells low volatile metallurgical coal used for the production of coke from its mines located in the Northern Appalachia coal region of the United States. It serves steel and coke producers. The company markets and sells its coal to customers in North America, South America, Asia, and Europe. Corsa Coal Corp. is headquartered in Friedens, Pennsylvania.
